我不在 请和我门外的花坐一会儿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyJgJMyEvQz6HjUCMDiSUnnkzE1B4ZB9DA1Ihsk1ZXEC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a13992ffc75a411ea76799c3a94d3a68~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793738&x-signature=n1s%2Bb09%2FZbfubCU1qAQnK%2BA%2BE14%3D","user_id":"3276997904833341","user_name":"藤夕艺诗相"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3276997904833341","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746058450,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428583424870321214","book_info":{"abstract":"【LOL电竞+双男主+强强+暗恋+破镜重圆+双向救赎+主攻视角（非攻控）】
天才打野·纯情醋精攻VS第一上单·宠夫狂魔受
4年前，在城际赛中华丽夺冠的“最佳上野”法夏和贺羽，因为一场误会分道扬镳，一个人间蒸发，一个因此怀恨在心。
4年间，连续倒在四强的天才打野贺羽被全网嘲成无冠属性的大霉逼，就在他心灰意冷之时，消失多年的法夏突然重新出现在他面前，向他伸出手：“贺羽，和我一起重新开始，我带你赢。”
贺羽冷笑一声：“带我赢？就凭你？”
直到一场常规赛。
眼看着对手的一枪子弹下一秒就要射穿贺羽的人头，坐拥全场最高经济的法夏，毫不犹豫闪现挡在他的身前，堪堪只剩一滴血。
在职业圈摸爬滚打了4年，从未掉过一滴泪的大心脏打野，却在一瞬间红了眼睛。
----
常规赛结束后。
贺羽沉默地看着法夏微信里的一水儿职业选手的未读信息，咬牙：“为什么天天会有这么多野男人找你。”
法夏：“额……都是找我solo的。”
贺羽微笑：“找你solo为什么要给你发爱心和亲亲？”
法夏沉思片刻：“友好的赛区文化吧。”
贺羽：“每天应付这么多人应该很累吧：）”
法夏想了想，索性上前拂掉手机，看着贺羽的双眼，语气认真温柔：“可我的对手永远只有你一个。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/10f736fd7200b4a604457a1fe5ef88e3","author":"金色晚风","author_id":"","book_id":"7428583424870321214","book_name":"都别惦记了，他是我的TOP","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5388人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":475,"name":"破镜重圆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=475&name=破镜重圆&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":482,"name":"暗恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=482&name=暗恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7428583559985955390","read_count":"5388","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"602315"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"262","tags":"双男主,破镜重圆,暗恋,电竞,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3554599f0a9072639a34d54e00b2b77a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449826&x-signature=pZLlQ38E5%2FW0vhj1xSR8NHDhX%2Bs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3674986511337098","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"223"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193706DFA93A843B65AC9411FF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
